title: salix longifolia var. interior
intro: Salix longifolia var. interior, also known as the willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the northern regions of North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Salix longifolia var. interior include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, treat fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Salix longifolia var. interior can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
